mapper.sql: select a.application_id as applicationId, a.application_code as applicationCode, a.application_name as applicationName, a.application_type as applicationType, a.classification_level as classificationLevel, a.application_status as applicationStatus, a.project_id as projectId, p.project_name as projectName, a.owner_org as ownerOrg, a.owner_name as ownerName, a.vendor_name as vendorName, a.vendor_owner as vendorOwner, a.portal_owner as portalOwner, a.resource_owner as resourceOwner, a.data_owner as dataOwner, a.security_owner as securityOwner, a.access_url as accessUrl, a.tech_stack as techStack, a.resource_summary as resourceSummary, a.network_summary as networkSummary, a.relation_summary as relationSummary, a.create_by as createBy, a.create_time as createTime, a.update_by as updateBy, a.update_time as updateTime, a.remark from inf_application a left join inf_project p on a.project_id = p.project_id
mapper.delete:
delete from inf_application where application_id in
#{applicationId}
